description: The Renderer Decoupling Settings component controls how the render engine will decouple from FrooxEngine when FrooxEngine lags to prevent sea-sickness.

fields.ActivationFramerate: How low the framerate from frooxengine needs to be to activate a decoupled frooxengine state
fields.DeactivationFrames: How high the framerate from frooxengine needs to be to deactivate a decoupled frooxengine state
fields.ForceDecouple: Whether or not to wait for frooxengine at all, and to just runaway render frames.
fields.AssetProcessingMaxTimeMilliseconds: How long to wait to process assets before continuing on the next frame anyways.

methods.ResetToDefault: Reset settings on this component back to their default.
